headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal Weight Rating on J. M. Smucker (SJM)
summary: The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) is one of the 11 Best Consumer Staples Stocks to Invest In. On April 23, 2026, Morgan Stanley lowered its price target on The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) to $104 from $118 and maintained an Equal Weight rating. The firm said it is adjusting estimates across packaged food […]
